race.comment: SKATING ON BY (8) has a moderate winning strike-rate but performed well last time at this track, finishing a close fourth over this track and trip. Knocking on the door and is desperate to break through. SOLAR GAZE (2) turned in a good effort last time but found one better here, beaten a head. Have to take seriously off that alone. THE LAST STAND (6) was a sharp improver last start here when chasing gamely into the placings at long odds. Draws well again and deserves more respect this time.  ANOTHER BRIDE (7) should appreciate getting back onto firmer footing and rates well on her effort two back. Has to be included.
